gap.description: Gap between icon and text in the text link.

internal.description: No icon on internal links (except in lists - defined in another token). Devselopers do not use this in the code.

internal-list.description: Icon displayed for internal links (list only). Devselopers do not use this in the code.

external.description: Icon displayed for all external links. Devselopers do not use this in the code.

phone.description: Icon displayed for all phone number links. Devselopers do not use this in the code.

mail.description: Icon displayed for email links. Devselopers do not use this in the code.
